Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Attachment, Right To Attach Order, And Protective Order; Application
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, Plaintiff Visona Tile, Inc.'s application for right to attach order and issuance of writ is taken off calendar. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Attachment, Right To Attach Order, And Protective Order; Application
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Continued To Mar-18-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS VISONA TILE, INC.(DBA GALLERIA TILE), DIANA WELCZECK, GIUSEPPE VISONA'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT, RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND PROTECTIVE ORDER IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 18, 2009 AT 10:30 AM. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application To Extend Temporary Protective Order Until 2/6/09
Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John N. Dahlberg, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Visona Tile, Inc.

After hearing, Plaintiff's ex parte application to extend temporary protective order is granted, expiration date 3/4/09. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Hearing On Right To Attach Order, Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment And/Or Issuance Of Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John N. Dahlberg, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Visona Tile, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Visona Tile, Inc.'s The ex parte application for a right to attach order is denied without prejudice to file and served a noticed application. The application for a temporary protective order is granted. The order shall remain in effect until February 7, 2009. Temporary Protective Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
